name: Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large salad bowl, combine the diced cucumber, chopped onion, sliced radish, chopped green pepper, and shredded cabbage.
2. Add the white pepper to taste.
3. Mix gently until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Serve without dressing, or try lemon juice or a salad vinegar for added flavor.
(13 calories per serving) 1 serving=1/2 Vegetable exchange
